message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber

participant "Data Consumer" as Consumer
participant "Data Source" as Source

alt [No updates]
  Consumer -> Source: 1a. GET [query URL]
  Consumer -> Source: 1b. POST [base query URL] with
end

alt [No updates]
  Source --> Consumer: 2a. search-response Bundle with new records
  (use most recent meta.lastUpdated in filter for subsequent polls)
  Source --> Consumer: 2b. Empty search-response bundle
end

opt
  loop
    Consumer -> Source: 3a. GET [next URL]
    Source --> Consumer: 3b. search-response with Bundle of next results
  end
end

@enduml
